id_mappings_surecare: Maps source record IDs from the Surecare system to OneTouch destination IDs for data migration. Standalone migration table.
ihcontract: Stores imported legacy client contract data from an external system including contract hours, dates, and references. Standalone import table.
inNewMeds: Feature flag table controlling whether the new medication module is enabled per company/location. Related to company and location.
inNewTasks: Feature flag table controlling whether the new tasks module is enabled per company/location. Related to company and location.
integrated_carers: Maps carers to their external system IDs for third-party integrations. Related to carer.
integrityv2: Logs data integrity check errors with SQL and status for investigation and resolution. Standalone audit table.
intergrityTest: Logs daily integrity test run counts and error totals. Standalone audit table.
invoiceeContact: Stores contact details for invoicee records, used when an external funder or body is the billing recipient. Related to contacts.
invoiceItemExtraFields: Defines custom extra fields that can be attached to invoice line items, with data type and active status. Standalone configuration table.
invoice_history_exports: Logs invoice history export actions by user, company, and location. Related to invoice_history_exports_buttons.
invoice_history_exports_buttons: Defines named export button types used in invoice history exports. Referenced by invoice_history_exports.
ipRestriction: Stores IP address restriction rules per company/location or carer, with exception and permission level flags. Related to carer.
jobs: Laravel queue table storing pending background job payloads. Standalone infrastructure table.
jobtype: Defines job/visit type records with colour, acronym, NMW inclusion, billing and pay behaviour, and archiving support. Central reference table used across scheduling, billing, and pay.
jobTypeAdd: Links specific job types to individual clients, controlling which job types are available for a given client. Related to client and jobtype.
jobtypeGroupName: Defines named groups of job types for reporting and billing category purposes. Referenced by cmPayrollJobtypeGroupItems.
jobtypeServiceTypes: Lookup table of named service types used to categorise job types. Referenced by jobtype.
job_batches: Laravel queue batch tracking table for grouped background jobs with completion and failure counts. Standalone infrastructure table.
keywords: Defines named keyword/tag labels for clients or carers with colour coding and side visibility flags. Related to company and location.
late_text: Logs late clock-in or clock-out text alert events for carers. Related to carer and client.
letters: Stores generated letter instances with content linked to a letter template. Related to letterTemplates.
letterSignOff: Stores digital signatures captured when a letter is signed off by a named person. Related to letters.
lettersSent: Records letters dispatched to clients or carers, tracking email/app delivery, sign-off status, and archiving. Related to client and carer.
letterTemplates: Defines reusable letter templates for clients or carers with area and default assignment. Referenced by lettersSent.
levelFt: Stores LevelFT payroll integration configuration per company, including API credentials, cycle settings, and location mappings. Standalone integration config.
levelFtCohort: Assigns specific carers to a LevelFT integration cohort. Related to carer and levelFt.
lineManager: Maps carers to their assigned line managers. Related to carer.
link: Stores short-lived activation link codes used to link carer or family accounts to the platform. Related to carer.
linkAccountLogs: Logs events where a linked/secondary carer account was used to access the system. Related to carer.
localAdminAccess: Controls which local admin permissions are granted to specific carers, including branch setup and location settings. Related to carer.
location: Defines location/branch records within a company, with extensive configuration for scheduling, medication, billing, holidays, clocking, and feature flags. Central table referenced by nearly all operational tables.
locationDetails: Stores additional location-level contact details including office hours and emergency numbers. Related to location.
locationPasswords: Stores hashed override passwords for protected actions per location, such as deleting timesheets or editing job types. Related to location.
location_invoicing_details: Stores internal invoicing notes for specific locations. Related to location.
log: Logs all carer and admin login events with browser, IP address, and app version details. Related to carer.
logEngage: Logs page navigation events within the Engage portal per client and carer. Related to client and carer.
logErrors: Logs application-level errors with page context and user information. Related to carer.
loginFails: Logs failed login attempts with username, password attempt, IP address, and side (admin/carer). Standalone security log.
loginPin: Stores PIN credentials for carers with attempt tracking and lockout support. Related to carer.
loginStatus: Records in-progress or recently completed visit clock-in/out state snapshots, used for real-time status display. Related to carer, client, and timesheets.
logoutReason: Defines named reasons for early or late clock-out events, with flags and ordering. Referenced by timesheet clock-out workflows.
logPageCMFamily: Logs page navigation events by family portal users. Related to cmFamily.
log_PageCM_2025: Logs page navigation events by admin or carer users in 2025, with menu and person context. Related to location.
magicLink: Stores one-time magic link hashes for passwordless carer login. Related to carer.
managementAutoTimesheets: Controls whether automatic timesheet generation is enabled per company/location. Related to company and location.
managementLocationAccess: Controls which locations a carer/admin can access at a management level. Related to carer.
managementLocationFullAdmins: Grants full cross-location admin access to specific carers within a company. Related to carer.
mandatoryEventReasons: Lookup table of reasons that can be given when a mandatory event is triggered. Related to company.
mandatorySkipReason: Records reasons given when mandatory medications or tasks are skipped during a visit, with skipped item IDs. Related to client and timesheets.
medicationAssign: Assigns a medication to a client with dosage, scheduling rules, recurrence days, and mandatory flag. Related to client and medicationList.
medicationAssignTimes: Defines specific administration time slots within a medication assignment. Related to medicationAssign.
medicationBalance: Tracks medication stock balance transactions for clients or wards, including reconciliation, administered, disposed, and signed-off amounts. Related to client.
medicationEmailLog: Logs medication-related alert emails sent to carers. Related to client and carer.
medicationEmarSignOff: Stores monthly eMAR (Electronic Medication Administration Record) sign-off signatures for clients. Related to client.
medicationForm: Lookup table of medication formulation types (e.g. tablet, liquid). Referenced by medicationList.
medicationList: Defines medication records assigned to clients including name, dose, form, route, and NHS medication reference. Related to client.
medicationOfflineUpdates: Queues medication administration records captured offline on the carer app, pending sync. Related to carer.
medicationReason: Defines reason codes for medication non-administration events, grouped by category. Related to medicationReasonCategory.
medicationReasonCategory: Defines categories for medication non-administration reasons with colour, ordering, comment requirement, and sign-off flags. Referenced by medicationReason.
medicationResults: Records individual medication administration outcomes for clients, including amount given, outcome, pain data, and missed event tracking. Related to client and medicationAssign.
medicationRoute: Lookup table of medication administration routes (e.g. oral, topical). Referenced by medicationList.
menu: Defines the customised menu item configuration per company/location for admin users. Related to menuItem.
menuItem: Defines the master list of available admin menu items with level, name, page, and icon. Referenced by menu.
menuItemCarer: Lookup table of carer app menu item names. Standalone.
message: Stores internal messages between admin users and carers or clients, with read and seen tracking. Related to carer.
mfa_tokens: Stores multi-factor authentication tokens for admin or carer login verification. Related to carer.
mmrReports: Stores monthly management report summaries per company/location/branch including billing, pay, hours, and gross profit totals. Related to company and location.
modal_popups: Logs which users have seen specific modal popup dialogs during a session. Related to carer.
myhomecare_clients: Stores imported client document mapping records from the MyHomeCare system. Standalone import table.
myhomecare_staff: Stores imported staff document mapping records from the MyHomeCare system. Standalone import table.
needsSectionPRSB: Stores PRSB-format care plan need entries for clients, including type and detail text. Related to careplanTakenPRSB and client.
newEnviroments: Feature flag table controlling whether a company/location uses the new app or new UI. Related to company and location.
news2Alerts: Defines NEWS2 score alert thresholds with suggested actions and observations per company/location. Standalone clinical config.
news2ObservationParameter: Records individual parameter scores within a NEWS2 observation session. Related to news2Observations and news2Parameters.
news2Observations: Records NEWS2 clinical observation sessions for clients with total score, frequency decisions, and actions agreed. Related to client.
news2ParameterRanges: Defines named scoring ranges for NEWS2 parameters with display ordering. Related to news2Parameters.
news2ParameterRangeValues: Defines the specific value thresholds and scores within a NEWS2 parameter range. Related to news2ParameterRanges.
news2Parameters: Defines the observable clinical parameters used in NEWS2 assessments (e.g. pulse, temperature) with min/max and measure. Related to company and location.
news2ParameterScores: Defines the score values and associated colours used in NEWS2 parameter scoring. Related to company and location.
news2Types: Lookup table of NEWS2 parameter types per company/location. Referenced by news2Parameters.
nhaCarePlan: Defines NH-style care plan templates linked to specific assessments per client and area. Referenced by nhaCarePlanTaken.
nhaCarePlanTaken: Records completed NH care plan instances for clients, with review classification and date. Related to nhaCarePlan and client.
nhAllergies: Records allergy and adverse reaction records for clients, including causative agent, severity, treatment, and professional details. Related to client.
nhAllergyHistories: Records historical allergy episode entries for clients linked to an allergy record. Related to nhAllergies.
nhAllergyHistoryFiles: Stores file attachments linked to allergy history entries. Related to nhAllergyHistories.
nhAllergyProfessionalSpecialities: Lookup table of clinical professional speciality codes for allergy records. Referenced by nhAllergies.
nhAllergyTypeQuestions: Defines custom questions associated with specific allergy types. Related to nhAllergyTypes.
nhAllergyTypes: Defines named allergy/adverse reaction types with optional icons. Referenced by nhAllergies and nhAllergyTypeQuestions.
nhAnswerActions: Defines action items triggered by specific question-answer combinations in NH forms. Related to nhFormQuestions.
nhAnswers: Records the header entry for a completed NH form instance, linking carer, client, form, and date. Referenced by nhAnswersText, nhAnswersOptions, nhAnswersCheckbox, nhAnswersDate, nhAnswersTime.
nhAnswersCheckbox: Stores checkbox-type responses within an NH form answer session. Related to nhAnswers.
nhAnswersDate: Stores date-type responses within an NH form answer session. Related to nhAnswers and nhFormQuestions.
nhAnswersOptions: Stores single-select option responses within an NH form answer session. Related to nhAnswers.
nhAnswersText: Stores free-text responses within an NH form answer session. Related to nhAnswers and nhFormQuestions.
nhAnswersTime: Stores time-type responses within an NH form answer session. Related to nhAnswers and nhFormQuestions.
nhaPrepopSentences: Stores pre-populated sentence suggestions for specific assessment question-answer combinations. Related to nhaQuestions.
nhaQuestionAnswers: Defines answer options for NH assessment questions, with append logic and flag support. Related to nhaQuestions.
nhaQuestions: Defines questions within NH assessment forms, organised by section with type and ordering. Related to nhaSections.
nhaSections: Defines named sections within NH assessments, with colour coding and sub-section support. Related to nhaCarePlan.
nhAssessmentCarePlanLink: Links NH assessment templates to care plan templates, with sign-off flag. Related to nhaCarePlan.
